biography: Anders, a familiar name at Vihti Golf Club, is known for his calm demeanor on the course. He approaches each round with a calculated strategy, carefully assessing every variable before making a decision. While some might perceive him as reserved, those who know him well understand his dry wit and unwavering dedication to the game.

Anders has graced the greens of the Hector Trophée on one occasion, bringing his distinctive brand of considered play to the competition. Although he has retired from the event, his presence is still felt by many who appreciate the skill and dedication he brought to the tournament.
